hooks.command: python -c "import pathlib,subprocess,sys; root=subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','--show-toplevel'], text=True).strip(); data=sys.stdin.read(); raise SystemExit(subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(pathlib.Path(root, '.codex', 'guard', 'codex_guard.py')), '--event', 'Stop'], input=data, text=True).returncode)"

python -c "import pathlib,subprocess,sys; root=subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','--show-toplevel'], text=True).strip(); data=sys.stdin.read(); raise SystemExit(subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(pathlib.Path(root, '.codex', 'guard', 'codex_guard.py')), '--event', 'PreToolUse'], input=data, text=True).returncode)"

python -c "import pathlib,subprocess,sys; root=subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','--show-toplevel'], text=True).strip(); data=sys.stdin.read(); raise SystemExit(subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(pathlib.Path(root, '.codex', 'guard', 'codex_guard.py')), '--event', 'PostToolUse'], input=data, text=True).returncode)"
